---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new tool or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like added?

A clear description of the feature or tool you're requesting.

## Omada API endpoint

If this is a new tool request, include the API path from `OMADA_TOOLS.md` or `docs/openapi/`:

- **Operation ID**: <!-- e.g. getBackupFileList -->
- **HTTP Method**: <!-- e.g. GET -->
- **API Path**: <!-- e.g. /openapi/v1/{omadacId}/sites/{siteId}/cmd/backup/files -->
- **OpenAPI file**: <!-- e.g. docs/openapi/08-maintenance.json -->

## Use case

Why do you need this? What workflow does it enable?

## Controller version

Does this endpoint exist in your Omada controller version? <!-- e.g. tested on 6.3.6 -->

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
